title: anathallis marginata
intro: Anathallis marginata, also known as the Yellow Butterfly Orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Anathallis marginata include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
